name: PSYCHEMEDICS CORP
summary: Psychemedics Corporation provides hair sample-based drug testing services using patented technology that digests hair to release trapped drugs, followed by proprietary enzyme immunoassay (EIA) screening and mass spectrometry confirmation. Tests detect cocaine, marijuana, PCP, amphetamines, opioids, fentanyl, benzodiazepines, synthetic cannabinoids, nicotine, and alcohol. Services target employers, law enforcement, treatment professionals, school administrators, and parents. Testing is performed at their Culver City, California facility.
